publishedAbstract: - The `noobaa-db-pg-0` Pod is not in `Running` state- I've had some maintenance activity where the `noobaa` Pod was restarted/rescheduled on some other node recently- I'm observing logs similar to this one from the `noobaa-db-pg-0` Pod ~~~ $ oc logs-f noobaa-db-pg-0 waiting for server to start.... 2026-02-12 05:55:48.213 UTC [24] LOG: redirecting log output to logging collector process 2026-02-12 05:55:48.213 UTC [24] HINT: Future log output will appear in directory "log"... stopped waiting pg_ctl: could not start server Examine the log output. ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF - Important fix to prevent corruption on Noobaa Postgres DataBase on noobaa-db-pg-0 pod
